title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Airbnb plans to bake in AI features for search, discovery and support
items.description: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky said the company wants to increase its use of large language models for customer discovery, support and engineering.

items.title: Indian pharmacy chain giant exposed customer data and internal systems
items.description: A backend flaw in web admin dashboards used by one of India's largest pharmacy chains, exposed thousands of online pharmacy orders.

items.title: Nothing opens its first retail store in India
items.description: The two-story location will sell products from Nothing and the more affordable, mass-market brand CMF.

items.title: Fintech lending giant Figure confirms data breach

items.title: Why top talent is walking away from OpenAI and xAI
items.description: AI companies have been hemorrhaging talent the past few weeks. Half of xAI’s founding team has left the company — some on their own, others through “r...

items.title: Sex toys maker Tenga says hacker stole customer information
items.description: The Japanese sex toy maker said a hacker broke into an employee's inbox and stole customer names, email addresses, and correspondence, including order...

items.title: Social Security Workers Are Being Told to Hand Over Appointment Details to ICE
items.description: The recent request goes against decades of precedent and puts noncitizens at further risk of immigration enforcement actions.

items.title: Senators Urge Top Regulator to Stay Out of Prediction Market Lawsuits
